designs.title: Botanical Transmission
designs.excerpt: A Victorian naturalist's field journal meets cellular biology — watercolour-washed, parchment-warm, built from three impossible words.

designs.title: Before the Silence
designs.excerpt: Hinoki, stone, and the space before words. A meditative Japanese-inspired design built from three unexpected words and warm cedar light.

designs.title: Liquid Chrome
designs.excerpt: A surface that reflects everything and remembers nothing. Metallic, minimal, in motion.
